## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests written **first** for any new behavior/logic/contract (or N/A: pure styling / copy)
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run typecheck` pass
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (unit + component)
- [ ] `npm run build && npm run test:e2e` pass (E2E + axe)
- [ ] `npm run test:lighthouse` still meets thresholds (a11y / SEO / best-practices / perf)
- [ ] Accessibility preserved — queried by role / accessible name, keyboard + focus OK
- [ ] No semicolons / single quotes (`npm run format`), LF endings
- [ ] No artist branding/content added that isn't mine to add (see LICENSE)
